prompt: A single client's page: their document checklist with per-document status, who on our staff is assigned, and the latest messages between us and them.
wire:
export default function DocumentActions() { const [docs, setDocs] = useState([]); const [selected, setSelected] = useState(""); const [action, setAction] = useState("verify"); const [reason, setReason] = useState(""); const [fileName, setFileName] = useState(""); const [phase, setPhase] = useState("idle"); const [message, setMessage] = useState(""); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClientDocuments({ id: "1" }).then((r) => setDocs(r.data || [])); }, []); const actionable = docs.filter((d) => d.status === "received" || d.status === "needs_review"); const submit = async () => { if (!selected) return; setPhase("sending"); const body = { action }; if (action === "receive") body.fileName = fileName; if (action === "reject") body.reason = reason; const result = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: "1", docId: selected, body }); if (result && result.status === "pending-approval") { setPhase("awaiting"); setMessage("Action submitted — awaiting approval."); } else { setPhase("done"); setMessage("Document status updated."); } }; const labelFor = (a) => ({ verify: "Verify", reject: "Reject", receive: "Mark received" }[a] || a); return (
